items.title: Interactive website added
items.description: A static website is included for browsing the IJCAI survey companion, foundation model explorer, evaluation matrix, curated papers, toolboxes, datasets, and benchmarks.

items.title: Structured data, resources, and official links updated
items.description: Survey links now point to IJCAI, PDF, DOI, and arXiv; resource sections were expanded and migrated to JSON.

items.title: Toolboxes, datasets, and benchmarks online
items.description: The planned repository resource sections are available and maintained for WSI research.

items.title: Curated papers online
items.description: Conference paper sections were added for tracking relevant WSI and pathology foundation model work.
